title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Vijaya Diagnostics

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Vijaya Diagnostics
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Vijaya Diagnostics in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vijaya Diagnostics:
Vijaya Diagnostics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijaya Diagnostics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
